title: tanacetum rotundifolium
intro: Tanacetum rotundifolium, also known as round-leaved pyrethrum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum rotundifolium include treating various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum rotundifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
